positive: A minimalist, highly detailed illustration of a majestic mountain lion (cougar) leaping gracefully through a stylized forest clearing. The composition should feature a strong, dynamic central silhouette of the cat in mid-air, backed by abstracted, clean geometric forest elements like pine branches and sharp rock formations. Use a strong duotone palette of deep indigo and vibrant cyan, with strategic accents of burnt orange for contrast. The style should be a blend of Art Deco geometric patterns and contemporary nature linework, creating a sense of powerful movement and sophisticated wildlife art. The design must be centered and optimized for seamless textile printing, with crisp lines and high contrast suitable for apparel prints. Cinematic, high contrast, vectorial linework, maximal detail, elegant, clean silhouette
negative: blurry, noise, artifact, low quality, poorly drawn, messy, smudged, gradient, watermark, text, logo, signature, multiple figures, extra limbs, bad anatomy, bokeh
